description: AI agents — autonomous systems that perceive, reason, plan, and act

concepts.label: AI Agent
concepts.description: Autonomous system that perceives its environment, maintains state, plans, and executes actions toward goals

concepts.label: Agent Memory
concepts.description: Mechanisms for agents to store and retrieve context across turns — short-term (context window), long-term (vector DB), episodic (session logs)

concepts.label: Tool Use
concepts.description: Capability for agents to invoke external APIs, code interpreters, browsers, and other tools to augment their actions

concepts.label: Reasoning
concepts.description: Cognitive process of drawing conclusions, making inferences, and solving problems — includes chain-of-thought and multi-step planning

concepts.label: Multi-Agent System
concepts.description: Architecture where multiple AI agents collaborate, compete, or communicate to accomplish tasks beyond the capability of any single agent
